commit.subject: LU-16307 tests: run sanity-sec test_31 in sanity-lnet
commit.message:
LU-16307 tests: run sanity-sec test_31 in sanity-lnet

Since sanity-sec.sh test_31 is doing a lot of lnet-specific testing,
always run it as part of sanity-lnet.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet,sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia3d63f2ae5ce4802526841220b96f9d17a175e44
